description: Refactor existing newsApiService.js into server/services/fetchers/newsApiOrgFetcher.js. Align with fetcher interface. Use keywords/filters from source config JSON.

description: Create Prisma migration: drop legacy tables (draft_posts, scheduled_posts, published_posts, email_responses, news_articles, prompt_templates, user_settings, article_sources). Enable pgvector, add embedding vector(1536) column with IVFFlat index.

description: Create server/services/fetchers/perplexityFetcher.js. Use Perplexity sonar model search API. Extract article URLs and content from search results.

The image gen prompt should be stored with name='image-generation' and contain the full prompt template from imageGenerationService.js.

description: Add Express route to serve generated article images. Route: GET /images/articles/:filename. Store images in server/public/images/articles/ directory. Ensure directory is created on startup. Add static file serving middleware in server/index.js. Image filenames should be article slug + .png. This is a simple v1 approach - can move to CDN/S3 later.

description: Add a social-generation prompt to the seed-prompts script and seed it into the DB. Template should accept {title}, {shortBlurb}, {longSummary}, {sourceUrl}, {platform} variables.

description: CRUD /api/admin/social-posts. POST /:id/publish enqueues to social-publish queue. Create queue + worker.

description: GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/articles. Edit title/blurb/summary/category/location/featured/status. POST /manual for manual entry. PUT /bulk for bulk actions. Re-embed on summary edit.

description: useLocation hook: browser geolocation, IP fallback (ip-api.com), map to AU city/state, localStorage. Location pill in search bar. Location picker overlay. Override persistence.
title: Location Detection

description: Seed known embeddings. Verify semantic relevance, similarity ordering, combined filters, related articles, empty results.
title: Vector Search Tests

description: Design and test the image generation prompt template that produces consistent editorial illustrations matching PropertyHack branding. Requirements: 1) Flat/geometric illustration style, NOT photorealistic photos. 2) Consistent colour palette incorporating cream, charcoal, and gold accent tones. 3) Property/architecture themed visual elements appropriate to article category (residential=houses, commercial=buildings, finance=charts/coins, policy=government buildings, etc). 4) Clean composition suitable for 16:9 card thumbnails. 5) No text in images. 6) Test with multiple article types to verify consistency. Store the prompt template as a configurable string in the service.
title: Image Prompt Engineering for Brand Consistency

description: Create a one-time script server/scripts/backfill-images.js that: 1) Finds all PUBLISHED articles with null imageUrl. 2) Queues each to the article-image queue for processing. 3) Logs progress. Run after the image generation pipeline is deployed to populate images for the ~55 existing articles.
title: Backfill Images for Existing Articles

description: Add a button on each article row (or article editor) that triggers AI social post generation. Show generated posts for review. Link to the social post editor for editing/approval/scheduling.

description: Supertest: publicArticles (pagination, filters, search, detail, related), adminSources (CRUD, auth), adminArticles (edit, bulk, manual), adminSocialPosts, auth (login/refresh/logout). >80% coverage.
title: Backend Integration Tests - API

description: Update imageGenerationService.js to read the image generation prompt template from the SystemPrompt table (name='image-generation') instead of using hardcoded strings. Fall back to the hardcoded prompt if DB lookup fails. Cache the prompt in memory with a 5-min TTL so we don't hit the DB on every image generation.
title: Wire Image Service to DB Prompt

description: PublicFeed.tsx replacing PublicArticlesGrid. Sticky header with search. SearchFilterBar.tsx. ArticleCard.tsx with image/title/blurb/meta. Featured cards with gold border. Infinite scroll with useInfiniteQuery. Skeleton loading. Mobile-first responsive. Add @tanstack/react-query.
title: Homepage - Public Feed

description: When clicking Edit on articles list or prompts list, the editor URL loads but content area shows infinite loading spinner. Direct URL navigation works fine. Likely the component fetch fires before auth token is ready after client-side React Router navigation, and silently stalls with no retry.
title: BUG: Admin editors show infinite spinner on click navigation

description: Change the image-generation prompt in both imageGenerationService.js and seed-prompts.js from flat geometric illustration to photorealistic editorial photography style. Update the DB prompt too.

description: Refactor GET /api/articles: cursor-based pagination, filters (location, category, date, search). Semantic search via pgvector. GET /:slug detail with viewCount. GET /:slug/related via vector similarity. GET /categories, /locations.

title: Fix favicon reference

description: GET /api/admin/social-posts returns 500 in browser. The page shell renders but the posts list shows 'Internal server error'. Investigate the social posts admin route handler.
title: BUG: Social Posts page returns 500 on load

description: Create server/services/imageGenerationService.js that uses Google's Imagen 3 API (via @google/generative-ai SDK, same as our Gemini setup) to generate article illustrations. The service should: 1) Accept article title, shortBlurb, and category as input. 2) Auto-generate an image prompt that produces consistent editorial illustration style - flat/geometric art, not photorealistic - using our brand palette (cream #f0f0f0, black #2b2b2b, gold #d4b038 accents). 3) Call Imagen 3 to generate a 1024x576 (16:9) image. 4) Upload the result to a storage location (start with saving base64 and serving from Express, can move to S3/Cloudinary later). 5) Return the image URL. Include error handling and fallback to placeholder.
title: Image Generation Service (Google Imagen 3)

description: AdminLayout.tsx with sidebar. Routes: Dashboard, Sources, Articles, Social Posts, Monitor. brand.primary background, brand.gold active state. Responsive collapse.

description: Create server/workers/articleImageWorker.js as a new BullMQ pipeline stage between summarise and embed. After summarisation publishes an article, add job to new 'article-image' queue. Worker calls imageGenerationService, updates article.imageUrl and article.imageAltText, then forwards to embed queue. Add queue definition in server/queues/articleImageQueue.js. Register worker in server/index.js. Concurrency: 1 (rate limit). Update articleSummariseWorker to queue to article-image instead of article-embed directly.
title: Image Generation Worker (BullMQ stage)

description: Add an image generation stage to the article ingestion pipeline. After summarisation, generate a unique illustration for each article using Google Imagen 3 (via Gemini API). Images should be consistent illustrative/editorial style (not photorealistic) that works with our cream/black/gold branding. Store generated image URL in article.imageUrl. This is the parent task - subtasks handle service, worker, and prompt design.
title: AI Article Image Generation - Pipeline Integration

description: server/services/social/: twitterAdapter.js, facebookAdapter.js, linkedinAdapter.js, instagramAdapter.js. Each: publish(post, creds), preview(post). socialPublishWorker.js calls adapters.

description: Add vitest, supertest, @playwright/test, msw. Create vitest configs (root + server). Create playwright.config.ts. Test helpers: DB setup/teardown, auth tokens, mock factories. Test scripts in package.json.
title: Test Infrastructure Setup

description: GET /api/categories crashes with Prisma error: Argument not must not be null. The route at server/routes/public/categories.js uses findMany with distinct: ['category'] combined with a where clause that has 'not: null' which is invalid in Prisma 6. Fix: use raw SQL SELECT DISTINCT or fix the Prisma query syntax.
title: BUG: /api/categories returns 500 - Prisma distinct+orderBy incompatibility

description: CRUD endpoints for /api/admin/sources. List, create, read, update, delete sources. POST /:id/fetch trigger. GET /:id/logs. superAdmin auth. express-validator.
